title: Raven the Little Rascal - The Big Race
original_title: Der kleine Rabe Socke 2 - Das große Rennen
overview: In a powerful story about teamwork, acceptance and finding one's calling, little Raven and his friends take part in an exciting and tumultuous race through the forest.
